entries.subject: feat: remove previous tag comparison from ReleaseNotesModal and add history to release notes payload #minor
entries.author: Tommaso Berti

bodyMarkdown:
# Release Notes v2.5.0

## Italiano
### Panoramica
Rilascio minor (releaseType: minor) che aggiorna il comportamento della visualizzazione delle note di rilascio e aggiunge la cronologia ai payload delle note stesse. Include anche artefatti di release generati per v2.4.0.

### Novita
- Release notes payload ora include la cronologia (history) — aggiunta nel payload delle note di rilascio.
- ReleaseNotesModal: rimosso il confronto con il tag precedente.

### Correzioni
- Nessuna correzione specificata nei commit.

### Migliorie Tecniche
- Aggiornati componenti e hook relativi alle note di rilascio:
  - src/components/ReleaseNotesModal.jsx
  - src/hooks/useLatestReleaseNotes.js
- Aggiornati file di release/artefatti:
  - public/data/release-notes.json
  - release-notes/.payload-v2.4.0.json
  - release-notes/v2.4.0.md
- Commit di documentazione/artefatti per v2.4.0 (github-actions bot).

### Modifiche Incompatibili
- Il comportamento che confrontava il tag precedente è stato rimosso da ReleaseNotesModal. Se processi o integrazioni si affidavano a quel confronto, potrebbero essere necessari aggiustamenti.

### Note di Migrazione
- Aggiornare eventuali script o componenti che dipendevano dal confronto con il tag precedente.
- Verificare il nuovo campo/struttura "history" nel payload delle release notes dove necessario.

### Limiti Noti
- Nessuna limitazione nota segnalata nei commit forniti.

### Confronto e Intervallo Commit
- Intervallo: v2.4.0..v2.5.0  
- Diff: https://github.com/tommaso-berti/codexPane/compare/v2.4.0...v2.5.0

Commit rilevanti:
- 96a5021 — feat: remove previous tag comparison from ReleaseNotesModal and add history to release notes payload #minor — Tommaso Berti
- 2d99198 — docs(release): v2.4.0 artifacts #skip-deploy [skip ci] — github-actions[bot]

---

## English
### Overview
Minor release (releaseType: minor) that changes how release notes are displayed and adds history to the release notes payload. Includes generated release artifacts for v2.4.0.

### New Features
- Release notes payload now includes history.
- ReleaseNotesModal: removed previous-tag comparison.

### Bug Fixes
- No bug fixes specified in the provided commits.

### Refactor & Engineering
- Updated release-notes related components and hooks:
  - src/components/ReleaseNotesModal.jsx
  - src/hooks/useLatestReleaseNotes.js
- Updated release artifacts/data:
  - public/data/release-notes.json
  - release-notes/.payload-v2.4.0.json
  - release-notes/v2.4.0.md
- Documentation/release artifacts commit for v2.4.0 (github-actions bot).

### Breaking Changes
- The previous-tag comparison behavior has been removed from ReleaseNotesModal. Integrations or automation relying on that comparison may need updates.

### Migration Notes
- Update scripts/components that relied on previous-tag comparison.
- Inspect and adapt to the added "history" in the release notes payload where applicable.

### Known Limitations
- No known limitations reported in the provided commits.

### Diff & Commit Range
- Range: v2.4.0..v2.5.0  
- Diff: https://github.com/tommaso-berti/codexPane/compare/v2.4.0...v2.5.0

Relevant commits:
- 96a5021 — feat: remove previous tag comparison from ReleaseNotesModal and add history to release notes payload #minor — Tommaso Berti
- 2d99198 — docs(release): v2.4.0 artifacts #skip-deploy [skip ci] — github-actions[bot]

# Release Notes v2.4.0

## Italiano

- Tipo di rilascio: minor (payload.releaseType = minor)  
- Da: v2.3.1 → A: v2.4.0

### Novita
- c442245 — Implementata la gestione della cronologia delle note di rilascio e migliorata la ReleaseNotesModal per una migliore esperienza utente (commit: "feat: implement release notes history management and enhance ReleaseNotesModal for better user experience").

### Correzioni
- Nessuna correzione segnalata in questo range di commit.

### Migliorie Tecniche
- 9e4a7dc — Aggiornati artefatti di rilascio e workflow CI (commit: "docs(release): v2.3.1 artifacts #skip-deploy [skip ci]").
- Modificati file rilevanti: .github/workflows/deploy.yml, public/data/release-notes.json, release-notes/v2.3.1.md, scripts/static-data/refresh-static-data.mjs, src/components/ReleaseNotesModal.jsx

### Modifiche Incompatibili
- Nessuna modifica incompatibile rilevata.

### Note di Migrazione
- Nessuna azione di migrazione richiesta.

### Limiti Noti
- Nessun limite noto riportato nei commit.

- Intervallo: v2.3.1..v2.4.0

Commit inclusi:
- c442245 — feat: implement release notes history management and enhance ReleaseNotesModal for better user experience — Tommaso Berti — 2026-03-18T12:31:22+01:00

- No bug fixes reported in this commit range.

# Release Notes v2.3.1

## Italiano
### Panoramica
Versione: v2.3.1 (release di tipo: patch)  
Intervallo commit: v2.3.0..v2.3.1  
Confronto: https://github.com/tommaso-berti/codexPane/compare/v2.3.0...v2.3.1

### Novita
Nessuna nuova funzionalità in questo rilascio (release di tipo patch).

### Correzioni
- 4d0c552 — fix: migliorata la pipeline di deploy con logica di retry per il pruning delle vecchie release (.github/workflows/deploy.yml).

### Migliorie Tecniche
- 2f9077d — migliorata la navigazione e il comportamento di scrolling: aggiornamenti a SectMenuItem e useDocContent (src/components/SectMenuItem.jsx, src/features/docs/useDocContent.js, src/components/PlaygroundShell.jsx).
- 795d290, 81bd476, d990698, 257c1a4, abc0bbf — aggiunta e aggiornamento di numerosi playground interattivi e contenuti guida. Aree coinvolte (file aggiornati, esempi non esaustivi):
  - MongoDB: src/content/mongodb/** (MongoShellContextPlayground.jsx, FindFilterProjectionPlayground.jsx, DataModelingChoicePlayground.jsx, QueryMatchingPlayground.jsx, commands.mdx, crud-operations.mdx, databases.mdx, operators-and-methods.mdx, structure.json)
  - React: src/content/react/** (JsxPlayground.jsx, UseEffectPlayground.jsx, UseStatePlayground.jsx, RoutingPlayground.jsx, FormsPlayground.jsx, virtual-dom, vari mdx e structure.json)
  - Redux: src/content/redux/** (ReducerPlayground.jsx, ReduxStorePlayground.jsx, MiddlewarePlayground.jsx, TodosSlicePlayground.jsx, file-structure e mdx)
  - JavaScript: src/content/javascript/** (AsyncAwaitPlayground.jsx, PromisesPlayground.jsx, ScopePlayground.jsx)
  - MUI: src/content/mui/** (diversi playground e mdx: data-display, feedback, forms, theme, layout, navigation, utilities, structure.json)
  - HTML/CSS: src/content/html/**, src/content/css/** (table, forms, validation, semantic landmarks, flexbox, selectors, specificity)
  - Git / GitHub / CI: src/content/git/**, src/content/github/** (workflow, stash, branch workflow, actions playgrounds, CLI)
  - HTTP / REST / JSON: src/content/http/** (JsonPlayground.jsx, RestClientDemo.jsx)
  - Bash: src/content/bash/** (environment editor, file manipulation, navigation, redirection playgrounds)
- Aggiornati metadati e manifest dei contenuti: src/content/docs-manifest.generated.json, pubblicazione release-notes artifacts (public/data/release-notes.json, release-notes/v2.3.0.md).

### Modifiche Incompatibili
Nessuna modifica incompatibile rilevata in questo intervallo.

### Note di Migrazione
Nessuna azione di migrazione richiesta per questa release.

### Limiti Noti
Nessun limite noto documentato in questo rilascio.

### Confronto e Intervallo Commit
Intervallo: v2.3.0..v2.3.1  
Confronto: https://github.com/tommaso-berti/codexPane/compare/v2.3.0...v2.3.1

Commit inclusi:
- 4d0c552 — fix: improve deployment script with retry logic for pruning old releases
- 2f9077d — feat: enhance SectMenuItem and useDocContent for improved navigation and scrolling behavior
- c9a1cf1 — Merge remote-tracking branch 'origin/main'
- 795d290 — feat: add code snippets and notes to various playgrounds for enhanced user guidance on async/await, Git workflows, environment variables, and more
- 81bd476 — feat: update interactive playgrounds with new titles, descriptions, and improved user guidance for Redux concepts
- d990698 — feat: update interactive playgrounds with detailed explanations and user guidance for JSX, props, forms, routing, hooks, and styling
- 257c1a4 — feat: add interactive playgrounds for MongoDB shell context, find filter and projection, data modeling choice, and query matching with explanations and user guidance
- abc0bbf — feat: add interactive playgrounds for MongoDB shell context, find filter and projection, data modeling choice, and query matching with explanations and user guidance
- 051bd65 — docs(release): v2.3.0 artifacts

---

## English
### Overview
Version: v2.3.1 (release type: patch)  
Commit range: v2.3.0..v2.3.1  
Compare: https://github.com/tommaso-berti/codexPane/compare/v2.3.0...v2.3.1

### New Features
No new features in this release (patch release).

### Bug Fixes
- 4d0c552 — fix: improved deployment script with retry logic for pruning old releases (.github/workflows/deploy.yml).

### Refactor & Engineering
- 2f9077d — improved navigation and scrolling behavior: updates to SectMenuItem and useDocContent (src/components/SectMenuItem.jsx, src/features/docs/useDocContent.js, src/components/PlaygroundShell.jsx).
- 795d290, 81bd476, d990698, 257c1a4, abc0bbf — added and updated numerous interactive playgrounds and guidance content. Affected areas (key files updated):
  - MongoDB: src/content/mongodb/** (MongoShellContextPlayground.jsx, FindFilterProjectionPlayground.jsx, DataModelingChoicePlayground.jsx, QueryMatchingPlayground.jsx, commands.mdx, crud-operations.mdx, databases.mdx, operators-and-methods.mdx, structure.json)
  - React: src/content/react/** (JsxPlayground.jsx, UseEffectPlayground.jsx, UseStatePlayground.jsx, RoutingPlayground.jsx, FormsPlayground.jsx, virtual-dom, various mdx and structure.json)
  - Redux: src/content/redux/** (ReducerPlayground.jsx, ReduxStorePlayground.jsx, MiddlewarePlayground.jsx, TodosSlicePlayground.jsx, file-structure and mdx)
  - JavaScript: src/content/javascript/** (AsyncAwaitPlayground.jsx, PromisesPlayground.jsx, ScopePlayground.jsx)
  - MUI: src/content/mui/** (multiple playgrounds and mdx: data-display, feedback, forms, theme, layout, navigation, utilities, structure.json)
  - HTML/CSS: src/content/html/**, src/content/css/** (table, forms, validation, semantic landmarks, flexbox, selectors, specificity)
  - Git / GitHub / CI: src/content/git/**, src/content/github/** (workflow, stash, branch workflow, actions playgrounds, CLI)
  - HTTP / REST / JSON: src/content/http/** (JsonPlayground.jsx, RestClientDemo.jsx)
  - Bash: src/content/bash/** (environment editor, file manipulation, navigation, redirection playgrounds)
- Updated content metadata and release artifacts: src/content/docs-manifest.generated.json, public/data/release-notes.json, release-notes/v2.3.0.md

### Breaking Changes
No breaking changes in this release.

### Migration Notes
No migration steps required for this release.

### Known Limitations
No known limitations documented for this release.

### Diff & Commit Range
Range: v2.3.0..v2.3.1  
Compare: https://github.com/tommaso-berti/codexPane/compare/v2.3.0...v2.3.1

Commits:
- 4d0c552 — fix: improve deployment script with retry logic for pruning old releases
- 2f9077d — feat: enhance SectMenuItem and useDocContent for improved navigation and scrolling behavior
- c9a1cf1 — Merge remote-tracking branch 'origin/main'
- 795d290 — feat: add code snippets and notes to various playgrounds for enhanced user guidance on async/await, Git workflows, environment variables, and more
- 81bd476 — feat: update interactive playgrounds with new titles, descriptions, and improved user guidance for Redux concepts
- d990698 — feat: update interactive playgrounds with detailed explanations and user guidance for JSX, props, forms, routing, hooks, and styling
- 257c1a4 — feat: add interactive playgrounds for MongoDB shell context, find filter and projection, data modeling choice, and query matching with explanations and user guidance
- abc0bbf — feat: add interactive playgrounds for MongoDB shell context, find filter and projection, data modeling choice, and query matching with explanations and user guidance
- 051bd65 — docs(release): v2.3.0 artifacts

Files changed (high level): see commit range compare; notable files include .github/workflows/deploy.yml, many src/content/** playground and mdx files, src/components/SectMenuItem.jsx, src/features/docs/useDocContent.js, and src/content/docs-manifest.generated.json.

# Release Notes v2.3.0

## Italiano
### Panoramica
Rilasciata v2.3.0 (range: v2.2.0..v2.3.0). Questo minor release introduce una serie di nuovi playground interattivi e aggiornamenti alla documentazione didattica. Confronto completo: https://github.com/tommaso-berti/codexPane/compare/v2.2.0...v2.3.0

### Novita
- Aggiunti playground interattivi per loop, promise, variabili, array, design pattern, async/await, event loop, funzioni e scope. (commit 30c8f93)
- Aggiunti playground interattivi per riuso di connessioni HTTP, esiti di REST request, parsing JSON, mapping query string e flusso di promise con fetch. (commit 1517418)
- Aggiunti playground per struttura del README, workflow di branch, builder di comandi GH e trigger di workflow. (commit d9e8303)
- Aggiunti playground Git per comandi avanzati: history amend, undo in sicurezza e workflow dello stash. (commit dc90d00)

### Correzioni
- Nessuna correzione specifica segnalata nei commit inclusi in questo range.

### Migliorie Tecniche
- Aggiornamento artefatti/documentazione di rilascio per v2.2.0 generati da GitHub Actions. (commit dfdfe39)
- Merge da main integrato. (commit 2d0fc4c)
- Modificati e aggiunti file nei percorsi di documentazione e componenti interattivi (es. src/content/javascript/*, src/content/http/*, src/content/git/*, src/content/github/*, plus file di manifest e release-notes.json).

### Modifiche Incompatibili
- Nessuna modifica incompatibile rilevata nei metadati dei commit.

### Note di Migrazione
- Nessuna azione di migrazione richiesta oltre al normale aggiornamento della versione.

### Limiti Noti
- Nessun limite noto indicato nei commit o nei file modificati.

### Confronto e Intervallo Commit
Range: v2.2.0..v2.3.0  
Compare: https://github.com/tommaso-berti/codexPane/compare/v2.2.0...v2.3.0

Commit inclusi:
- 30c8f93 — feat: enhance interactive playgrounds for loops, promises, variables, arrays, design patterns, async/await, event loop, functions, and scope with detailed explanations and improved user experience — Tommaso Berti (2026-03-18)
- 1517418 — feat: add interactive playgrounds for HTTP connection reuse, REST request outcomes, JSON parsing, query string mapping, and fetch promise chain flow — Tommaso Berti (2026-03-17)
- d9e8303 — feat: add interactive playgrounds for README structure, branch workflow, GH command builder, and workflow triggers — Tommaso Berti (2026-03-17)
- 2d0fc4c — Merge remote-tracking branch 'origin/main' — Tommaso Berti (2026-03-17)
- dc90d00 — feat: add interactive playgrounds for Git commands including history amendment, undo safely, and stash workflow — Tommaso Berti (2026-03-17)
- dfdfe39 — docs(release): v2.2.0 artifacts #skip-deploy [skip ci] — github-actions[bot] (2026-03-17)

---

## English
### Overview
Released v2.3.0 (range: v2.2.0..v2.3.0). This minor release adds a set of interactive playgrounds and documentation updates. Full diff: https://github.com/tommaso-berti/codexPane/compare/v2.2.0...v2.3.0

### New Features
- Added interactive playgrounds for loops, promises, variables, arrays, design patterns, async/await, event loop, functions, and scope. (commit 30c8f93)
- Added interactive playgrounds for HTTP connection reuse, REST request outcomes, JSON parsing, query string mapping, and fetch promise chain flow. (commit 1517418)
- Added interactive playgrounds for README structure, branch workflow, GH command builder, and workflow triggers. (commit d9e8303)
- Added Git playgrounds for advanced commands: history amendment, safe undo, and stash workflow. (commit dc90d00)

### Bug Fixes
- No bug fixes were present in the commits for this release.

### Refactor & Engineering
- Release artifacts/documentation update for v2.2.0 generated by GitHub Actions. (commit dfdfe39)
- Merge from main integrated. (commit 2d0fc4c)
- Multiple documentation and interactive component files updated/added (notably under src/content/javascript, src/content/http, src/content/git, src/content/github, plus docs manifest and release-notes.json).

### Breaking Changes
- No breaking changes identified in the provided commits or changed files.

### Migration Notes
- No migration steps required beyond updating to the new version.

### Known Limitations
- No known limitations indicated by the commits or changed files.

### Diff & Commit Range
Range: v2.2.0..v2.3.0  
Compare: https://github.com/tommaso-berti/codexPane/compare/v2.2.0...v2.3.0

Commits:
- 30c8f93 — feat: enhance interactive playgrounds for loops, promises, variables, arrays, design patterns, async/await, event loop, functions, and scope with detailed explanations and improved user experience — Tommaso Berti (2026-03-18)
- 1517418 — feat: add interactive playgrounds for HTTP connection reuse, REST request outcomes, JSON parsing, query string mapping, and fetch promise chain flow — Tommaso Berti (2026-03-17)
- d9e8303 — feat: add interactive playgrounds for README structure, branch workflow, GH command builder, and workflow triggers — Tommaso Berti (2026-03-17)
- 2d0fc4c — Merge remote-tracking branch 'origin/main' — Tommaso Berti (2026-03-17)
- dc90d00 — feat: add interactive playgrounds for Git commands including history amendment, undo safely, and stash workflow — Tommaso Berti (2026-03-17)
- dfdfe39 — docs(release): v2.2.0 artifacts #skip-deploy [skip ci] — github-actions[bot] (2026-03-17)

Changed files (selection):
- public/data/release-notes.json
- release-notes/v2.2.0.md
- src/content/javascript/* (many components and MDX)
- src/content/http/* (components and MDX)
- src/content/git/* (components and MDX)
- src/content/github/* (components and MDX)
- src/content/docs-manifest.generated.json

# Release Notes v2.2.0

## Italiano

### Panoramica
- Tipo di rilascio: minor (payload.releaseType = "minor").  
- Aggiunte numerose playground interattive per CSS, HTML e Bash; miglioramenti visivi e refactor dei componenti playground; aggiornamenti documentazione e correzione CSS mirata.

### Novita
- Aggiunte playground interattive per concetti CSS: box sizing, positioning, font stack readability, grid templates, button states, flex axes, transition timing, HSL controls, breadcrumb patterns, specificity, selectors e responsive units. (c85e606)
- Nuove playground interattive per form, tabelle e accessibilità con linee guida dettagliate. (e5e416b)
- Migliorata leggibilità e styling del componente TablePlayground. (ccc7998)
- Migliorato componente Callout con styling dinamico e supporto theming. (5963b7a)
- Refactor: i componenti playground ora usano PlaygroundShell; aggiunte sezioni e titoli più chiari per le demo. (35eddc9, 003d531, ffcac9d)
- Aggiunte linee guida per playground interattive nella documentazione. (ed1fe39)

### Correzioni
- Rifinito il selettore CSS per nascondere il primo heading nel corpo markdown. (533f39f)

### Migliorie Tecniche
- Introduzione/uso di PlaygroundShell per uniformare i playground. (src/components/PlaygroundShell.jsx, 35eddc9)
- Aggiornamenti a file di stile e tema (src/styles/mdx.css, src/styles/theme.js).
- Aggiornamenti di struttura/controllo contenuti e nuovi file playground aggiunti in src/content/* per CSS, HTML e Bash.

### Modifiche Incompatibili
- Nessuna modifica incompatibile rilevata in questo intervallo di commit.

### Note di Migrazione
- Nessuna azione di migrazione specifica richiesta.

### Limiti Noti
- Nessun limite noto segnalato nei commit o nei file cambiati.

### Confronto e Intervallo Commit
- Diff: https://github.com/tommaso-berti/codexPane/compare/v2.1.0...v2.2.0  
- Intervallo: v2.1.0..v2.2.0

Commits inclusi:
- c85e606 — feat: add interactive playgrounds for CSS concepts including box sizing, positioning, font stack readability, grid templates, button states, flex axes, transition timing, HSL controls, breadcrumb patterns, specificity, selectors, and responsive units
- ccc7998 — feat: enhance TablePlayground styling for improved readability
- 35eddc9 — feat: refactor playground components to use PlaygroundShell and add new interactive playgrounds
- 2a37efe — Merge remote-tracking branch 'origin/main'
- ed1fe39 — feat: add guidelines for interactive playgrounds in documentation
